title: Fletching & Quality
subtitle: The craft of the straight shot

pages.text: &6Fletching&r binds cord, stave, and shaft into bows, arrows, and fishing tools. At the Fletching Station you add the ingredients like the Crafting Stone, then play a stretch-timing minigame — better timing attaches a higher &6quality&r to the finished item.

Quality is the heart of skilled crafting. It scales a bow's arrow velocity and durability, an arrow's damage, and so on. Hand-crafting caps at a Fine quality; a skilled crafter NPC with good equipment can do better.
Fletching unlocks the station and the fishing rod, but the bow and its arrows still wait on the separate Archery research. The Fletcher is the settlement's first dedicated crafter NPC.
